+fn verify_qe_identity_signature(
+    qe_identity_data: &[u8],
+    signature: &[u8],
+    cert_chain: &[u8],
+) -> Result<(), Error> {
+    use x509_parser::parse_x509_certificate;
+    use sha2::{Sha256, Digest};
+    use ring::signature::{UnparsedPublicKey, ECDSA_P256_SHA256_ASN1};
+
+    // Parse the certificate chain and extract the signing certificate
+    let certs = parse_certificate_chain(cert_chain)?;
+    let signing_cert = certs.first()
+        .ok_or(Error::InvalidCertificateChain("Empty certificate chain"))?;
+
+    // Extract the public key from the signing certificate
+    let public_key = UnparsedPublicKey::new(
+        &ECDSA_P256_SHA256_ASN1,
+        signing_cert.public_key()?,
+    );
+
+    // Verify the signature
+    public_key.verify(qe_identity_data, signature)
+        .map_err(|_| Error::InvalidQeIdentitySignature)?;
+
+    Ok(())
+}
+
